name: FellSwap Papyrus
description:
💤Single Chapter: Cuddles

Waking up was always a chore for Papyrus.

Today, the hum of a vacuum pulled him from his dreams. He grumbled, reluctant to leave the comfort of his nap, but a familiar scent drifted through the house, and with it, the quiet thrill of knowing you were nearby.

With a slow, lazy stretch, he decided that maybe—just maybe—waking up wouldn’t be so bad after all.

(I wanted to update my baby🏃🏼‍♀️)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
